name: Percoll Stock Solution (Isotonic, Self-Prepared)

components.name: Percoll (Sigma P1644 or GE Healthcare 17-0891-01)
components.note: Neat Percoll: density 1.130 g/mL; colloidal silica coated with PVP

components.name: 10× PBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺)
components.note: 1/10 volume to make isotonic Percoll stock (1× PBS final = 0.15 M NaCl)

notes.en:
Mix 9 parts Percoll + 1 part 10× PBS to create Isotonic Percoll Stock (IPS, density ~1.124 g/mL). Prepare working gradients by diluting IPS with 1× PBS:
- For PBMC (density 1.077): 77% IPS in 1× PBS → (0.77 × 1.124) + (0.23 × 1.007) = 1.077 g/mL
- For mitochondria: 18% and 30% IPS layers (see mitochondria_isolation)
- For neutrophils: 70% and 55% IPS layers (density 1.08 and 1.10)
Verify density of each layer by weighing 1.000 mL on analytical balance. Do NOT autoclave (degrades coating). Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm) for cell work. Store at 4°C; stable 1 year.
notes.zh:
9 份 Percoll + 1 份 10× PBS 配制等渗 Percoll 储液（IPS，密度 ~1.124 g/mL）。IPS 用 1× PBS 稀释配制工作梯度：
- PBMC（密度 1.077）：77% IPS in 1× PBS
- 线粒体：18% 和 30% IPS 层（参见 mitochondria_isolation）
- 中性粒细胞：70% 和 55% IPS 层（密度 1.08 和 1.10）
每层密度用分析天平称量 1.000 mL 验证。勿高压灭菌（破坏包被）。细胞实验用 0.22 µm 过滤除菌。4°C 保存，稳定 1 年。

ref: GE Healthcare Percoll Methodology and Applications Booklet; Böyum et al. (1991) Eur J Haematol 47:308; Pertoft (2000) J Biochem Biophys Methods 44:1–30
